english translation text: Taboot Hasan ka haiThe coffin of Imam Hasan (a.s)English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Taboot Hasan ka hai hai aur Khun me Nahaya haiDil Fatema Zehra ka ye kisne dukhaya hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THE COFFIN OF HASAN (AS) IS COVERED IN BLOOD,
WHO HAS BROKEN THE HEART OF FATIMA ZAHRA (AS)?

urdu transliteration text:
Kat kat ke gire tukre maula ke jigar keQasim ko shahadat ka andaaz bataya hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
PIECES OF THE LIVER OF IMAM (AS) FELL TO THE GROUND,
HE TAUGHT QASIM THE WAY TO SHAHADAT

urdu transliteration text:
Maula ke janaze par Baarish hai teero ki,Ye ajre risalat hai ummat ke chukaya hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THE COFFIN OF IMAM WAS SHOWERED WITH ARROWS,
THIS IS THE WAY THE UMMAH HAS RETURNED THE FAVOUR OF PROPHET

urdu transliteration text:
Lo Karbobala ka ab aaghaz huwa logomahol Muharram ka Shabbir ne manaya hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THIS EVENT IS THE BEGINNING OF KARBALA,
SHABBAR (A.S) HAS PREPARED THE GROUND FOR MUHARRAM

urdu transliteration text:
Ai Maula Hasan Isko Kafan bhi na milegaShabbir ne mayyat ko Kaandhe pe uthaya hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O IMAM HASAN (AS)! YOUR BROTHER WILL NOT EVEN HAVE A SHROUD,
HUSAIN (AS) CARRIES HIS BROTHERS BODY ON HIS SHOULDERS

urdu transliteration text:
Raihan Qayamat me dozakh unhe dhundegiDil fatema Zahra ka jis jis ne dukhaya hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text: ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT, ALL THOSE PEOPLE WHO HAVE HURT BIBI FATIMA ZAHRA (SA) WILL BE IDENTIFIED
